title: MikuCoin: Misprint
description: The chaotic side of MikuCoin. Pared with MikuCoin: Reprinted
body:
( This is a rework of my mod [MikuCoin](https://modrinth.com/mod/mikucoin) cuz I lost the code for it )


Looks like this batch is a Misprint of [MikuCoin: Reprinted](https://modrinth.com/mod/mikucoin-reprinted)... well, I'm still selling it! Here is **MikuCoin: Misprint**


MikuCoin: Misprint is an addon for MikuCoin: Reprinted that adds crazy stuff like...

- Estrogen
- Forcefem
- Reinforced Eye of Ender
- The Eye of The Void
- [Pigstep (AvM Remix)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oDZK3_c-Vkc)
- Needle
- Black Desert
- Unstable Effect
- ViraBand
- Rainbow Water

and even more in the future!!!


***(all art is by [Static](https://bsky.app/profile/did:plc:yhfjkhsiofr5ge57ytwgv7lk))***
